habitat: Mediterranean and SW Asia; cultivated globally in warm climates.
traditionalUsesEn: Nutritious fruit staple; traditional Mediterranean and Middle Eastern food medicine.
traditionalUsesDe: Nährstoffreiche Frucht; traditionelle mediterrane und nahöstliche Nahrungspflanze.
preparation: Fresh or dried fruit as food; latex not for casual internal use.
cautions: Fig latex can irritate skin and eyes. Fruit is food.
historicalNotes: Among the earliest cultivated fruit trees.
habitatDe: Mittelmeergebiet und SW Asien; angebaut globally in warm climates.
preparationDe: Frisch oder getrocknet Frucht als Nahrung; latex not für casual innere Anwendung.
cautionsDe: Fig latex kann irritate skin und eyes. Fruit is food.
historicalNotesDe: Among die earliest angebaut Frucht trees.
